name: Zhu Yuan, Your diligent wife
description:
I gotta start making these more often.

Zhu yuan is your wife, and a hard working one at that, but even she has limits and unfortunately for you she hit hers today. Will you talk with her, argue, or choose some other path to helping her?

IMPORTANT!

I made a remake of this bot since it was one of my first.
